products.name: ALCE NERO

Contains 100% tomato passata with no added water

products.name: CASAR

trustedSourceSummary: No official consumer documents were found in the last 60 days, so the latest available official sources from 2025-2026 were used. Organizations used: Altroconsumo. Altroconsumo’s June 2025 laboratory tests recommend ALCE NERO and CASAR as top‑pick passata brands, noting they contain genuine tomato passata without added water and are priced competitively. The evidence is fresh (published 2025‑06‑24).
